digest.title: IRGC Claims It Destroyed Amazon's Bahrain Data Center
At AI Summit, South Korea Outlines Its AI Future With NVIDIA and Partners
digest.tldr: At this week’s AI Summit in San Francisco, South Korean President Jae Myung Lee and some of the country’s top business leaders and researchers are meeting with NVIDIA and ecosystem partners to chart Korea’s AI progress.

digest.title: Kimi K3 exploited the latest Redis server
Claude’s voice mode is now available for Opus and Sonnet
digest.tldr: Until now, voice mode has only been available on Claude Haiku, Anthropic's faster but less powerful model.  Now the company is making its Opus and Sonnet models available in voice mode, and extending its reach into apps…
